ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Patient's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Patient's last name */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Patient's date of birth */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (e.g., Male, Female, Other) */,
  "smoking_status" INTEGER /* Current smoking status (true if the patient currently smokes) */,
  "smoking_status_details" TEXT /* Detailed smoking status (e.g., non-smoker, ex-smoker, light smoker) */,
  "diabetes_status" INTEGER /* Diabetes status (true if the patient has diabetes) */,
  "diabetes_type" TEXT /* Type of diabetes (Type 1, Type 2, Gestational) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Patient's email address */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* A brief summary of the patient's medical history */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of known allergies */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vital_signs" (
  "vital_sign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vital sign record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the vital signs were measured */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time when the vital signs were measured */,
  "sysbp" REAL /* Systolic Blood Pressure */,
  "diabp" REAL /* Diastolic Blood Pressure */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate in beats per minute */,
  "respiratory_rate" INTEGER /* Respiratory rate in breaths per minute */,
  "body_temperature" REAL /* Body temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "cholesterol" INTEGER /* Total Cholesterol level */,
  "glucose" REAL /* Blood Glucose level */,
  "blood_pressure_status" TEXT /* Status of blood pressure (e.g., Normal, Prehypertension, Hypertension) */,
  "cholesterol_status" TEXT /* Status of cholesterol (e.g., Normal, Borderline, High) */,
  "glucose_status" TEXT /* Status of blood glucose (e.g., Normal, Prediabetes, Diabetes) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vital sign record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vital sign record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vital_sign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vital_signs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the health condition record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the health condition (e.g., Any CHD, Diabetes) */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition was diagnosed */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Summary of the treatment plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the condition (e.g., Active, In Remission, Resolved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the health condition record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the health condition record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_conditions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deaths" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the death record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who reported the death */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date when the death was reported */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the death record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the death record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deaths_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistic record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "any_chd" INTEGER /* Any CHD status (true if the patient has any coronary heart disease) */,
  "death" INTEGER /* Death status (true if the patient is deceased) */,
  "heart_disease_risk" TEXT /* Risk level for heart disease (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "diabetes_risk" TEXT /* Risk level for diabetes (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "obesity_status" TEXT /* Status of obesity (e.g., Not Obese, Overweight, Obese) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_statistics_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, researcher) */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., Read-Only, Read-Write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
